description: ABOUT  This is a hand-curated set containing the best (in my opinion) 550 FBNeo Arcade games based on the FBNEO 1.0.0.3 romset.   All games in this set are FULL NON MERGED with BIOS INCLUDED so you should be able to play every game without any of the typical headaches.   The only exception is the NEO GEO games which require the included neogeo.zip bios. Samples are also included, so you should have everything you need to play.    Most of the Retro Achievements compatible games are included!   All games are PARENT versions to make life easier, however there are a few exceptions: 2-player variants which allow player selection (Simpsons, TMNT, X-MEN) US localized name differs from the world name (Desert Assault, Rush 'N Attack) Enhancements (Tetris The Absolute The Grand Master 2 PLUS, Samurai Shodown V Special) Child is compatible with RetroAchievements but parent is not (Gee Bee) The games are sorted into several folders, however they are all from the same FBNEO set and can be organized however you would like (and whatever folder schemes your system supports). This set contains 100 SNK Neo Geo games (neogeo folder)  29  Capcom CPS I games (cps1 folder)  37  Capcom CPS II games (cps2 folder)   6   Capcom CPS III games (cps3 folder) 39   Toaplan & Cave Shooters 375  Additional Arcade games (fbneo folder) 585 Total Games! INSTALL 1 - Copy the files from the "samples" folder into the proper directory on your system (consult your system documentation.  A typical location is: bios/fbneo/samples) 2 - Copy the files from the "games" folder into the proper directory (consult your system documentation).  You can put all games in the same folder, or split them up if your system supports it. 3 - Make sure the included neogeo.zip file is in the correct location.  Usually it remains in the same directory as your Neo Geo games, but some systems require it to be copied to the bios folder. 4 - For each folder you copied games into, make sure that the default emulator for that folder is set to FBNeo (consult your system documentation) 5 - Scape your games for clean names, preview images and videos, if desired. GAME LIST SNK Neo Geo (neogeo folder) 2020 Super Baseball (set 1) 3 Count Bout (NGM-043 ~ NGH-043) Aero Fighters 2 Aero Fighters 3 Alpha Mission II Andro Dunos Art of Fighting Art of Fighting 2 Art of Fighting 3: The Path of the Warrior Bang Bead Baseball Stars 2 Baseball Stars Professional Blazing Star Blue's Journey Breakers Revenge Burning Fight Bust-a-Move Bust-A-Move Again Crossed Swords Crossed Swords 2 (bootleg of CD version) Double Dragon Eight Man Far East of Eden: Kabuki Klash Fatal Fury 3: Road to the Final Victory Fatal Fury Special Fatal Fury: King of Fighters Fighter's History Dynamite Ganryu Garou: Mark of the Wolves Ghost Pilots Goal!
